verse_text: But when they sought to lay hands on Him, they feared the multitudes, because they took Him for a prophet.

links.context: Christ, the upright word Incarnate, was hated for publicly rebuking the scribes and Pharisees in the gates ([[MAT.21:45]], [[MAT.21:46]]; [[LUK.11:45]]-12:1; 13:14-17; [[JOH.7:7]]; 8:20; see also Pr
